_publications._publicationTitle: Chemical genetic screens reveal defective lysosomal trafficking as synthetic lethal with NF1 loss.

_contextSnippet: There was no significant change in γ-H2AX expression following Y102 treatment (Fig. S2A), suggesting that Y102 does not mediate cell death through a DNA damage response pathway
details: Y102 does not mediate cell death through DNA damage response pathway, as no significant change in γ-H2AX expression was observed
